name: mosalam/services
title: Our Services
description: Service category cards, each with a list of specific sub-services.

default.title: Web Hosting
default.description: Premium managed and unmanaged cloud hosting solutions. We offer isolated virtual environments, enterprise-grade containerization, SSD storage, and daily automated backups for maximum speed and uptime.

default.title: IT Services
default.description: Proactive system operations, cybersecurity consulting, and infrastructure management. We keep your systems updated, monitored, and secured under strict zero-trust standards.

default.title: ERP Systems
default.description: Complete implementation and customization of digital enterprise systems. We deploy Odoo ERP and Moodle LMS systems optimized for school management, retail, CRM, and supply chain workflows.

default.title: Front End Development
default.description: Designing and building highly responsive, pixel-perfect user interfaces. We utilize React and Next.js to craft lightweight, SEO-friendly, and blazing-fast web interfaces.

default.title: Back End Development
default.description: Engineering secure, scalable database architectures and robust application program interfaces (APIs). We build the core logic and backend integrations that drive your complex business apps.
